hero.headline: LPU Online MBA in Digital Marketing: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: Lovely Professional University's UGC-DEB approved online MBA with a Digital Marketing specialisation. NIRF #31 University, NAAC A+. Rs 2,00,000 standard fee, Rs 1,61,600 with 20% Student Grant. Zero-cost 24-month EMI at Rs 6,733/month. Foundation of Digital Marketing, Social Media Marketing, SEO, Online Advertising, Web and Social Media Analytics, and Digital Marketing Strategy in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: LPU Online MBA Digital Marketing: NIRF #31, NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, Rs 2L standard or Rs 1.61L with 20% grant, zero-cost 24-month EMI. Digital marketing depth with SEO, Social Media Marketing, Online Advertising, Web and Social Media Analytics, and Digital Marketing Strategy. Strong for performance marketing, digital brand, and growth marketing careers.

about.body:
The LPU Online MBA in Digital Marketing is offered by Lovely Professional University's online division. LPU holds NAAC A+ accreditation, NIRF #31 University ranking (2025), and NIRF #44 in Management. The online programme is UGC-DEB approved.

The Digital Marketing specialisation delivers dedicated Sem 3-4 subjects covering Foundation of Digital Marketing, Social Media Marketing, Search Engine Optimisation, Online Advertising, Web and Social Media Analytics, and Digital Marketing Strategy. These subjects cover the complete digital marketing stack from channel execution to strategy and measurement.

India's digital advertising market crossed Rs 50,000 crore in 2024-25. Every company from FMCG to financial services now maintains dedicated digital marketing teams. LPU's affordable MBA with zero-cost EMI and a dedicated digital marketing specialisation is designed for the large number of working digital marketing professionals seeking a credentialed management degree to move from execution to strategy roles.

sem3Subjects.name: Foundation of Digital Marketing
sem3Subjects.description: Apply digital marketing frameworks, online consumer behaviour theory, and integrated digital campaign planning.

sem3Subjects.name: Social Media Marketing
sem3Subjects.description: Design social media strategies across Meta, Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube for brand building and community engagement.

sem3Subjects.name: Search Engine Optimisation
sem3Subjects.description: Apply on-page SEO, technical SEO, link building, and content optimisation strategies to improve organic search visibility.

sem3Subjects.name: Corporate Strategy and Entrepreneurship
sem3Subjects.description: Apply digital-first strategy frameworks, online business model design, and growth strategy for digitally-led businesses.

sem3Subjects.name: Generic Elective I
sem3Subjects.description: Elective subject from the GE basket chosen by the student to complement the Digital Marketing specialisation.

sem3Subjects.name: Seminar on Summer Training
sem3Subjects.description: Present digital marketing summer project findings to faculty panel, developing data-driven communication skills.

sem4Subjects.name: Capstone Project
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied digital marketing project delivering campaign strategy, analytics dashboard, or SEO and content plan for a business.

sem4Subjects.name: Online Advertising
sem4Subjects.description: Manage Google Ads, Meta Ads, programmatic display, and performance marketing campaigns with ROAS and CPA optimisation.

sem4Subjects.name: Web and Social Media Analytics
sem4Subjects.description: Apply Google Analytics 4, Meta Insights, and social listening tools to measure campaign effectiveness and user behaviour.

sem4Subjects.name: Digital Marketing Strategy
sem4Subjects.description: Build integrated digital marketing strategy: channel mix planning, digital brand strategy, and omnichannel customer journey design.

sem4Subjects.name: Generic Elective II
sem4Subjects.description: Elective subject from the GE basket chosen by the student to complement the Digital Marketing specialisation.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 shared core subjects across all LPU Online MBA specialisations. See the main LPU Online MBA page for core subject list.

whoHires.body:
Digital Marketing MBA graduates from LPU Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** E-commerce and D2C brands, FMCG, EdTech, Fintech, IT services, Media and advertising agencies

**Entry-level roles:** Digital Marketing Executive, SEO Analyst, Social Media Manager, Performance Marketing Executive, Content Strategist

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Digital Marketing Manager, SEO Manager, Performance Marketing Manager, Growth Manager, Digital Brand Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** Head of Digital Marketing, VP Growth, Chief Marketing Officer, Digital Strategy Director

**Top hiring organisations:** Amazon India, Flipkart, Myntra, Nykaa, Zomato, Swiggy, PhonePe, Paytm, BYJU's, Unacademy, HUL Digital, ITC Digital, Dentsu India, Publicis Sapient, WPP India

skills.body:
The LPU Digital Marketing specialisation builds skills that e-commerce and brand employers test at digital marketing manager and growth manager levels:

**Technical skills:**
- Search Engine Optimisation: on-page and technical SEO implementation, link building strategy, keyword research, and content optimisation for organic search management roles
- Online Advertising: Google Ads campaign management, Meta Ads optimisation, programmatic display buying, and performance marketing with ROAS and CPA metrics for paid media roles
- Web and Social Media Analytics: Google Analytics 4 configuration, Meta Insights reporting, social listening tool management, and attribution modelling for analytics and insights roles
- Social Media Marketing: platform-specific content strategy, community management, influencer marketing management, and social commerce for social media management roles

**Applied skills:**
- Digital Marketing Strategy: omnichannel customer journey design, digital brand strategy, and integrated channel mix planning for senior digital marketing and growth strategy roles
- Foundation of Digital Marketing: digital consumer behaviour analysis and integrated campaign planning frameworks

**Soft skills:** Presenting digital marketing ROI to business stakeholders, managing advertising agency relationships, building data-driven business cases for digital budget allocation, and leading cross-functional digital transformation projects.

comparisons.body:
Comparing LPU Online MBA Digital Marketing against peers:

**vs Amity Online MBA Digital Marketing:** Amity is NAAC A+ and NIRF #22 at Rs 2,25,000. Amity Digital Marketing is a strong all-India brand with good digital marketing curriculum. LPU Digital Marketing at Rs 1,61,600 with grant is significantly more affordable. LPU offers zero-cost EMI; Amity does not. For digital marketing professionals on a budget targeting North India e-commerce and brand roles, LPU is a clear value choice.

**vs MUJ Online MBA Marketing (with Digital Marketing electives):** MUJ Marketing includes Coursera Plus digital marketing certifications from Google and Meta. MUJ's digital certifications add global brand recognition to the academic credential. LPU Digital Marketing is a dedicated standalone specialisation with SEO, Online Advertising, and Web Analytics as core subjects. Both are comparable options; MUJ offers more global certification weight while LPU is more affordable with zero-cost EMI.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Marketing Management:** NMIMS Marketing Management covers digital marketing as part of broader marketing management. NMIMS does not offer a dedicated Digital Marketing specialisation. For students specifically targeting digital marketing as a career focus, LPU's dedicated Digital Marketing specialisation is more targeted than NMIMS Marketing Management.

fees.body:
The LPU Online MBA in Digital Marketing offers 2 fee tracks:

**Track 1 - Standard Fee**:
- Registration fee: Rs 1,000 (one-time)
- Total program fee: Rs 2,00,000
- Semester fee: Rs 50,000 per semester across 4 semesters

**Track 2 - With 20% Student Grant**:
- Registration fee: Rs 1,000 (one-time)
- Total program fee: Rs 1,61,600 after 20% Student Grant
- Semester fee: Rs 40,400 per semester

**Zero-Cost EMI option (Track 2)**:
- 24-month zero-cost EMI: Rs 6,733 per month
- No interest charged. No processing fee from the university.
- EMI is routed through the university's marketing partner.

The 20% Student Grant is applied at admission. Confirm current grant eligibility and applicable conditions with our counsellor before applying.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with LPU each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees and grant eligibility with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Lovely Professional University (LPU) and carries the LPU name with the MBA designation. The Digital Marketing specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from LPU Online MBA Digital Marketing alumni. Ratings from post-completion surveys.

items.name: Shreya Bhatia
items.liked: Online Advertising and Web and Social Media Analytics subjects were directly applicable to my performance marketing role. Digital Marketing Strategy gave me the framework to move from execution to strategy.
items.disliked: SEO subject could be updated to include GA4 migration and Core Web Vitals content.
items.body: I had 3 years in performance marketing and the LPU Digital Marketing MBA helped me move to digital marketing manager. The Rs 1.61L with zero-cost EMI was the clear deciding factor. Delhi e-commerce companies recognised the LPU credential.

items.name: Abhishek Thakur
items.liked: Social Media Marketing and Digital Marketing Strategy were well-structured and practically applicable. Good for D2C brand roles.
items.disliked: Google Ads and Meta Ads coverage could include more hands-on campaign simulation exercises.
items.body: Good programme for digital marketing career advancement. The digital-specific curriculum was more targeted than what general marketing MBAs offer. Zero-cost EMI was a genuine benefit.

items.name: Priyanka Verma
items.liked: Foundation of Digital Marketing and Online Advertising subjects gave me strong conceptual grounding.
items.disliked: Analytics tools coverage was slightly dated. More live platform access would help.
items.body: Solid digital marketing credential at a very competitive price. For North India digital marketing careers in e-commerce, FMCG, and startups, LPU Digital Marketing is a well-recognised and affordable choice.

faqs.question: How does the LPU 20% Student Grant work?
faqs.answer: The 20% Student Grant reduces the standard Rs 2,00,000 fee to Rs 1,61,600. It is applied at admission. Confirm current grant eligibility conditions with our counsellor before applying, as grant availability may vary by intake cycle.

faqs.question: Is LPU Online MBA zero-cost EMI genuinely interest-free?
faqs.answer: Yes. The 24-month zero-cost EMI at Rs 6,733 per month carries no interest charge and no processing fee from the university. It is routed through the university's marketing partner. Confirm current EMI terms before committing.

faqs.question: Does LPU Digital Marketing MBA cover Google Ads and Meta Ads?
faqs.answer: Yes. Online Advertising as a Sem 4 subject covers Google Ads, Meta Ads, and programmatic advertising. Web and Social Media Analytics covers Google Analytics 4, Meta Insights, and attribution modelling. These are academic coverage subjects; for platform certifications, Google and Meta offer free official certifications that students should pursue alongside the MBA.

faqs.question: Is LPU Digital Marketing MBA suitable for SEO professionals?
faqs.answer: Yes. Search Engine Optimisation is a dedicated Sem 3 subject covering on-page SEO, technical SEO, link building, and content optimisation. Combined with Web and Social Media Analytics and Digital Marketing Strategy, the programme is well-suited for SEO professionals targeting SEO manager and digital strategy roles.

faqs.question: Is LPU Online MBA NIRF ranked?
faqs.answer: Yes. Lovely Professional University is ranked NIRF #31 (University category, 2025) and NIRF #44 in the Management category. This places LPU among the top-ranked universities offering UGC-DEB approved online MBAs in India.

chooseIf: You are a working digital marketing professional targeting digital marketing manager, growth manager, or digital strategy roles.
You want a UGC-DEB approved MBA from a NIRF #31 university at Rs 1,61,600 (with grant) or Rs 2,00,000 standard.
You want dedicated coverage of SEO, Online Advertising, Web Analytics, and Digital Marketing Strategy as core Sem 3-4 subjects.
consider: If global digital marketing certifications (Google, Meta) through Coursera Plus are important, MUJ Online MBA Marketing with Coursera Plus is a strong alternative at comparable fees.
If pan-India brand recognition is the priority, Amity Online MBA Digital Marketing at Rs 2.25L offers strong all-India hiring recognition.
If a broader marketing credential with digital components is preferred, LPU's Marketing specialisation or NMIMS Marketing Management may offer more versatility.
